title: christella subjuncta
intro: Christella subjuncta, also known as the Fan-leaved Lady's Finger Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Christella subjuncta include reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. It is often prepared for consumption in the form of a tea or tincture, with some herbal practitioners also using the plant in infusions and salves.
